message: Inherently dangerous function: gets performs no bounds checking.
recommendation: Use fgets with an explicit buffer size.

message: Potential OS command injection through shell command execution.
recommendation: Avoid shell execution; use fixed executable paths and separated arguments.

message: Potential OS command injection through shell command execution.
recommendation: Avoid shell execution; use safer process APIs with separated arguments.

message: Potential Windows command execution injection risk.
recommendation: Use CreateProcess with fixed executable paths and validated arguments.

message: Potential command execution or file execution injection risk.
recommendation: Avoid shell execution and validate executable paths and arguments.

message: Potential command execution or file execution injection risk.
recommendation: Avoid shell execution and validate executable paths and arguments.

message: Potential buffer overflow: strcpy does not check destination buffer size.
recommendation: Use snprintf, strlcpy where available, or std::string/std::array with bounds checks.

message: Potential buffer overflow: strcat appends without checking destination buffer size.
recommendation: Use snprintf, strlcat where available, or std::string with size validation.

message: Potential buffer overflow: sprintf writes formatted output without a size limit.
recommendation: Use snprintf with the destination buffer size.

message: Potential buffer overflow from unbounded scanf input.
recommendation: Use a width limit, e.g. scanf("%31s", buf), or use fgets.

message: Potential buffer overflow: vsprintf writes formatted output without a size limit.
recommendation: Use vsnprintf with the destination buffer size.

message: Potential buffer overflow from unbounded sscanf input.
recommendation: Use a width limit or parse with safer bounded routines.

message: Potential buffer overflow from unbounded fscanf input.
recommendation: Use a width limit or read with fgets and parse safely.

message: Potential buffer overflow from unbounded vscanf input.
recommendation: Use bounded input patterns or fgets-based parsing.

message: Potential buffer overflow from unbounded vsscanf input.
recommendation: Use bounded input patterns or safer parsing.

message: Potential buffer overflow from unbounded vfscanf input.
recommendation: Use bounded input patterns or fgets-based parsing.

message: Potential out-of-bounds write from unchecked memory copy length.
recommendation: Validate destination size before copying or use bounded abstractions.

message: Potential out-of-bounds write from unchecked memory move length.
recommendation: Validate destination size before moving memory.

message: Insecure temporary file name creation may allow race conditions.
recommendation: Use mkstemp or another secure temporary file API.

message: Insecure temporary file name creation may allow race conditions.
recommendation: Use mkstemp or another secure temporary file API.

message: Potential format string injection if format string is user-controlled.
recommendation: Use a string literal as the format argument e.g. printf("%s" str).

message: Potential format string injection if format string is user-controlled.
recommendation: Use a string literal as the format argument and never pass user data directly.

message: Potential format string injection if format string is user-controlled.
recommendation: Validate and sanitize the format string before use.

message: Potential format string injection if format string is user-controlled.
recommendation: Validate and sanitize the format string before use.

message: Potential format string injection if format string is user-controlled.
recommendation: Use a string literal as the format argument.

message: Potential format string injection if format string is user-controlled.
recommendation: Validate and sanitize the format string before use.

message: Potential format string injection if wide format string is user-controlled.
recommendation: Use a wide string literal as the format argument.

message: Potential format string injection if wide format string is user-controlled.
recommendation: Use a wide string literal as the format argument.

message: Potential path traversal if filename is user-controlled.
recommendation: Validate and canonicalize file paths; apply strict allowlists before opening.

message: Potential path traversal if path argument is user-controlled.
recommendation: Validate and canonicalize file paths before use; apply strict allowlists.

message: Potential path traversal if path argument is user-controlled.
recommendation: Validate and canonicalize paths; use a restricted directory file descriptor.

message: Potential path traversal if filename is user-controlled.
recommendation: Validate and canonicalize file paths before reopening.

message: Potential path traversal: tainted source or destination path.
recommendation: Validate both path arguments before renaming.

message: Potential path traversal: tainted path may cause unintended file deletion.
recommendation: Validate and canonicalize the path before removal.

message: Potential path traversal: tainted path may cause unintended file deletion.
recommendation: Validate and canonicalize the path before unlinking.

message: Potential path traversal: tainted path may delete an unintended directory.
recommendation: Validate and canonicalize the directory path before removal.

message: Potential path traversal: tainted path may create a directory in an unintended location.
recommendation: Validate and canonicalize the directory path before creation.

message: Potential path traversal: tainted path may alter permissions on an unintended file.
recommendation: Validate and canonicalize the path before changing permissions.

message: Potential path traversal: tainted path may alter ownership of an unintended file.
recommendation: Validate and canonicalize the path before changing ownership.

message: Potential command injection: tainted argument passed to execl.
recommendation: Use fixed executable paths and validate all arguments.

message: Potential command injection: tainted argument passed to execle.
recommendation: Use fixed executable paths and validate all arguments and environment.

message: Potential command injection: execlp searches PATH which may be attacker-influenced.
recommendation: Use execv with an absolute path instead of execlp.

message: Potential command injection: tainted argument passed to execv.
recommendation: Use fixed executable paths and validate all arguments.

message: Potential command injection: tainted argument passed to execve.
recommendation: Use fixed executable paths and validate all arguments and environment.

message: Potential command injection: execvp searches PATH which may be attacker-influenced.
recommendation: Use execve with an absolute path instead of execvp.

message: Potential command injection: tainted argument passed to execvpe.
recommendation: Use fixed executable paths and validate all arguments.

message: Potential command injection: tainted argument passed to posix_spawn.
recommendation: Validate executable path and all arguments before spawning.

message: Potential Windows command injection through CreateProcess.
recommendation: Use fixed executable paths with separate argument lists; avoid the lpCommandLine form.

message: Potential Windows command injection through CreateProcessA.
recommendation: Use fixed executable paths with separate argument lists; avoid the lpCommandLine form.

message: Potential Windows command injection through CreateProcessW.
recommendation: Use fixed executable paths with separate argument lists; avoid the lpCommandLine form.

message: Potential buffer overflow: stpcpy does not check destination buffer size.
recommendation: Use stpncpy or snprintf with an explicit size limit.

message: Potential buffer overflow: wcscpy does not check destination buffer size.
recommendation: Use wcsncpy or a bounded wide-string alternative.

message: Potential buffer overflow: wcscat appends without checking destination buffer size.
recommendation: Use wcsncat or a bounded wide-string alternative.

message: Potential buffer overflow: strncat size parameter is remaining space not total buffer size.
recommendation: Pass sizeof(buf)-strlen(buf)-1 as the size or use snprintf.

message: Potential SQL injection: tainted data in query string passed to mysql_query.
recommendation: Use parameterized queries or prepared statements with mysql_stmt_prepare.

message: Potential SQL injection: tainted data in SQL string passed to sqlite3_exec.
recommendation: Use sqlite3_prepare_v2 with bound parameters instead.

message: Potential SQL injection: tainted data in PostgreSQL query passed to PQexec.
recommendation: Use PQexecParams with parameterized queries instead.
